name: Oracle Workboard
summary: Manage the Oracle Workboard — a collaborative terminal & dashboard sidecar powered by the maw-ssh/sshx fork.
description: The workboard plugin wraps the MEYD-605/maw-ssh sidecar runtime, providing install, serve, status, and Android APK packaging commands through the maw CLI. It binds to a separate port (default :3457) so it never collides with maw-js itself.

subcommands.name: open
subcommands.summary: Open workboard in the default browser.

subcommands.name: install
subcommands.summary: Install/build the sidecar runtime from the maw-ssh source checkout.

subcommands.name: serve
subcommands.usage: maw board serve [--dev] [--source PATH] [--host HOST] [--port PORT] [--password VALUE]

subcommands.name: status
subcommands.summary: Show sidecar status, source dir, and URL.

subcommands.name: password
subcommands.summary: Set or rotate the workboard access password.

subcommands.name: apk
subcommands.summary: Package the workboard PWA as an Android APK via Bubblewrap/TWA.

optional: Android SDK + JDK (for maw board apk)
